value_basis: the factory drawing fixes this body as R67 and independent July/May target-board views directly read 4K7; the target marking supersedes the .006 sheet's 2k while connectivity remains separate

component_observations.observation: the upper physical lead of the factory-identified red 4K7 R67 terminates at a distinct component-side solder pool; no copper continuation leaves the visible pool
an independent oblique May view directly reads 4K7 on the same R67 body and separates its pin-2 lead/joint, but likewise exposes no onward route

cross_side_registration.basis: 14 paired D102 component/solder pin centres from ref/photos/juku-pcb-2/endpoints.csv
cross_side_registration.model: affine component 200418174 pixels to solder 200522685 pixels
cross_side_registration.interpretation: the physical R67.2 location is a bare backside trace corner without an annulus, drill, solder joint, or other inter-layer handoff

solder_observations.observation: the D102-local cross-side projection falls on an unperforated copper corner; no backside joint proves connection to that coincident trace
the overlapping solder tile independently shows the same bare trace corner without a via or solder joint

non_promotion_basis: two component angles stop at the R67.2 solder pool and two cross-side-registered solder views prove that the coincident backside trace has no inter-layer handoff; direct continuity is required
